summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of TruTown Marketplace landing page. All 13 core features and interactive elements working perfectly with 100% test coverage.
passed_tests: Hero section with correct tagline 'Where serious buyers meet trusted sellers' and description
App Store and Google Play download buttons in hero section
Trust badges section with 3 security features
Navigation bar with logo (/logo.png), 4 nav links, and 'Get the App' button
Social proof stats strip displaying Zero, 100%, ID, 24/7 stats
How It Works section with all 4 steps (List Item, Deposit, Meet & Inspect, Complete Deal)
Features bento grid with all 8 feature cards (No More Flakes, Secure Deposits, Verified Sellers, Safe Meeting Spots, Request Police Presence, Inspection Time, Dispute Resolution, Buyer Protection)
Testimonials section with all 6 testimonial cards including names and star ratings
FAQ section with all 8 accordion items with working expand/collapse functionality
CTA section with download buttons and call-to-action content
Footer with admin portal link and all footer navigation columns (Product, Company, Legal)
Navigation anchor links scroll correctly to all sections (how-it-works, features, testimonials, faq)
Mobile responsive menu toggle works correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
Fonts loading correctly: DM Serif Display for headings, Manrope for body text
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
No JavaScript errors or console warnings detected
Shadcn UI accordion component functioning properly
